name: My employer says the ladder fall was my fault, can they deny comp?
description: No, comp is no-fault regardless of your role.

mainEntity.name: My employer says the ladder fall was my fault, can they deny comp?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, comp is no-fault regardless of your role.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**No, workers' comp is no-fault; your negligence doesn't bar benefits.**

Coverage if on job; employer can't deny for 'fault'. Disputes go to commission.[1]

- Fault affects third-party suits only.
- Prove work-related.
- Avoid signing fault admissions.

Appeal denials; Utah/Idaho favor employees on arising-out-of claims.
